task: Improve AGENTS.md so every future Codex thread follows the same project coordination protocol.
summary: Updated AGENTS.md with explicit future-thread session start, reporting, status, done criteria, conflict, and security rules, then updated dashboard handoff and latest reports.

completed_work.title: Session start protocol
completed_work.evidence: AGENTS.md now requires reading current status, project brief, handoff, main goal, recent runs, and identifying the linked goal before edits.

completed_work.title: End-of-task reporting protocol
completed_work.evidence: AGENTS.md now requires unique run JSON reports, Markdown thread summaries, handoff updates, latest report updates, and conflict-aware current status updates.

completed_work.title: Status, done, conflict, and security rules
completed_work.evidence: AGENTS.md now defines requested statuses, done criteria, conflict rules, and secret/log handling rules.

remaining_work: Consider aligning .agent-dashboard/protocol/status-taxonomy.md and report-schema.md with the updated AGENTS.md protocol.
Replace starter project context with actual product details.

conflict_check.details: Read the available recent run report. It covered initial setup and did not indicate active overlapping work on this task.

verification.name: dashboard_context_read
verification.details: Read current status, project brief, handoff, main goal, latest report, thread index, project metadata, architecture, decisions, risks, and recent run reports before editing.

verification.name: requirements_coverage_review
verification.details: Confirmed AGENTS.md includes all requested sections: session start, end-of-task reporting, statuses, done criteria, conflict rules, and security rules.

verification.name: json_parse_check
verification.details: All JSON files under .agent-dashboard parsed with PowerShell ConvertFrom-Json after edits.

verification.name: section_presence_check
verification.details: Used rg to confirm AGENTS.md contains Session Start Protocol, End-of-Task Reporting Protocol, Status Definitions, Done Criteria, Conflict Rules, and Security Rules.

next_recommended_prompts: Align .agent-dashboard/protocol/status-taxonomy.md and report-schema.md with the newer AGENTS.md protocol.
Update PROJECT_BRIEF.md with actual product scope and success criteria.

secret_handling.notes: No secrets, credentials, tokens, cookies, or private keys were added.
